ngl i want to blow my head off with a shotgun

changelogs.title: The 'finally ready' update
changes: Touched up all of the Foundation of the Site
Added all the entries for every system pages, site info, and guides, but they are empty for now (Beside the Tier List)
Implement the Tier Lists: it has an Overall Ranking which is a placeholder (by Air Putrifier) for now, and 20 incompleted matchup specific lists
Added Nickolas4F entries for Head of the Hei's Overview, Matchups, and Counterplay.
Added Nickolas4F entries for Salaryman's Overview, Matchups, and Counterplay.
Added Nickolas4F entries for Locust Guy's Overview, Matchups, and Counterplay.
Added a completed entry (all the frame data, and details) for Cursed Strikes which will act as the GOLD STANDARD of the site
Added Air Putrifier entries for Black Death's skills' overview and special's overview
Added Air Putrifier entries for Cursed Partners' skills' overview and specials' overview
Decided on the matchup tiers for every Nickolas4F matchup wiki entries (Head of the Hei, Switcher, Locust Guy, and Salaryman)
Added all the skills, M1s, and specials entries for all the empty character pages
Added all the character portraits
Convert all media resources on the site to WebP and WebM form to save storage and bandwidth
Added a new warning system to the site
Improve and Optimize the site Loading process
Added two centralized dashboards: Side Dashboard and Character Dashboard, to help with navigation and info dumping in the foreseeable future
Added a completed entry (all the frame data, and details) for Cursed Strikes which will act as the GOLD STANDARD of the site
Boomcat is coming back
